title: Rape
text: Provisions relating to rape and sexual assault as defined under Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita.

title: Punishment for rape
text: Punishment for commission of rape and aggravated forms.

title: Assault or use of criminal force with intent to dishonour
text: Assault or criminal force with intent to outrage modesty.

title: Sexual harassment
text: Sexual harassment and punishment for unwelcome acts.

title: Cruelty by husband or relatives
text: Cruelty against a woman by husband or relative of husband.

title: Organised crime
text: Offences by organised crime syndicate and related penalties.

title: Kidnapping and abduction
text: Kidnapping, abduction and wrongful confinement related offences.

title: Human trafficking
text: Aggravated trafficking and organised trafficking networks.

title: Wrongful confinement
text: Wrongful confinement and related restraint offences.

title: Criminal intimidation
text: Threatening injury to person, reputation or property.

title: Criminal breach of trust
text: Criminal breach of trust by public servant or others.

title: Criminal defamation
text: Defamation by words spoken or intended to be read.

title: Abduction for exploitation
text: Abduction linked to exploitation or forced labour.
